BindingBundle.description: Bundle of platform-specific artifacts produced by a successful bind.

capability.description: Capability match report from the pre-binding evaluation.

profileIdentity.description: Capability profile identity used for the binding gate.

BindingFile.description: A single generated orchestration artifact file.

relativePath.description: Path relative to the binding output root (POSIX-style separators).

CapabilityProfile.description: Capability profile for an orchestrator (SPEC Ch 16 §6).

capabilities.description:
Capabilities supported by this profile.

Accepts either capability objects (`{ id: ... }`) or bare id strings.

dpcsVersion.description:
Supported DPCS specification version.

Defaults to empty when omitted so legacy stub YAML can load; empty values fail [`validate_profile`] with `DPCS-CAP-004`.

diagnostics.description:
Non-error diagnostics observed during evaluation (for example version warnings).

On CLI JSON failure paths, this may be replaced with the full diagnostic list.

missingMandatory.description: Mandatory capability ids demanded by the plan but missing from the profile.

planContractId.description: Contract id from the plan when available.

satisfied.description: Capability ids demanded by the plan and satisfied by the profile.

unsupportedOptional.description:
Profile capabilities marked `optional: true` that were not demanded.

Informational only: these are unused optional supply, not SPEC “unsupported optional capabilities” that may be ignored on the demand side.

oneOf.description: No semantic differences in considered fields.
Candidate preserves baseline observable semantics (additive OK).
Candidate removes optional content while preserving core semantics.
Compatible only under declared conditions / warnings.

CompatibilityPolicy.description: Declared compatibility policy for a Pipeline Contract.

ConformanceClaim.description: Explicit conformance claim for an implementation.

ConformanceLevel.description: Conformance levels defined by SPEC Ch 23.

ConformanceProfile.description: Conformance profile document constraining validation / claims.

requireGovernance.description: When true, contracts must declare a `governance` block.

requireSecurity.description: When true, contracts must declare a `security` block.

ContractReference.description: Reference to an external contract artifact.

ControlFlow.description: Declared control dependency between pipeline elements.

DataFlow.description: Declared movement of data between addressable endpoints.

dataset.description: Optional dataset identifier carried by the flow.

Diagnostic.description:
A single deterministic diagnostic observation.

Diagnostics describe observations only and must not change pipeline semantics.

objectRef.description: Optional object reference within the contract.

sourceLocation.description: Optional source location in the original document.

stage.description: Processing stage that produced the diagnostic.

DiagnosticStage.description: Stage of the DPCS processing pipeline that produced a diagnostic.

oneOf.description: Execution analysis (reserved; unused in 0.9.0 toolkit scope).

ExecutionRequirements.description: Declared execution requirements for a Pipeline Contract.

externalDependencies.description: External service dependencies required for execution.

ExternalDependency.description: External service dependency required for successful execution.

FailureScope.description: Scope of a failure semantics declaration.

stepId.description: Target step identifier when kind is `step`.

FailureSemantics.description: Declared failure behavior for a pipeline scope.

scope.description: Scope to which the semantics apply.

triggers.description: Conditions that trigger this failure handling.

GatePlacement.description: Placement of a quality gate within a pipeline.

stepId.description: Target step identifier when kind is `beforeStep` or `afterStep`.

GovernanceMetadata.description: Declarative governance metadata attached to a Pipeline Contract.

governingAuthority.description: Governing authority when distinct from owner.

GraphEdge.description: A single directed edge in the pipeline graph.

IntegrityReference.description: Integrity reference for tamper detection / attestation.

value.description: Digest, signature reference, or external locator (not an embedded key).

InterfacePort.description: A single input or output port on the pipeline interface.

contractRef.description: Reference to an external contract (for example ODCS).

name.description: Interface name for this port (SPEC Ch 4 §4–5).

Metadata.description: Descriptive metadata attached to a Pipeline Contract or interface.

PackageArtifactEntry.description: One artifact entry inside a package manifest.

path.description: Path relative to the package root (POSIX separators).

PackageManifest.description: Top-level manifest for a `.dpcspkg` pipeline package.

PipelineContract.description:
Root Canonical Object Model for a DPCS Pipeline Contract.

Field names follow the camelCase serialization used in `SPEC.md` examples.

contractReferences.description: External contract references (ODCS, DTCS, and others).

dpcsVersion.description: DPCS specification version this contract targets.

failureSemantics.description: Failure semantics attached to the pipeline.

qualityGates.description: Quality gates attached to the pipeline.

edges.description: Graph edges between steps or control points.

PipelineInterface.description: External boundary of a Pipeline Contract.

metadata.description: Interface metadata required by this specification.

PipelineLineage.description: Declared lineage information for a Pipeline Contract.

PipelinePlan.description: Canonical intermediate representation produced from a validated contract.

contractId.description: Identity of the source pipeline contract.

contractVersion.description: Version of the source pipeline contract.

dependencyEdges.description: Dependency edges derived from graph, control flow, and data flow.

dpcsVersion.description: DPCS specification version declared by the source contract.

stepOrder.description:
Ordered step identifiers in plan order.

Ordering is a deterministic topological sort over the dependency graph. Ready nodes are emitted in sorted step-id order (not declaration order).

version.description: Optional independent Pipeline Plan version (SPEC Ch 20).

PipelineProvenance.description: Provenance describing contract origin and relationships.

PipelineStep.description: Logical unit of work within a Pipeline Contract.

contractRef.description: Reference to a contract that defines step behavior.

id.description: Stable step identifier unique within the contract.

transformRef.description: Reference to a DTCS transform contract.

type.description: Step type (for example `dtcs:transform` or an extension type).

PlanDependencyEdge.description: Directed dependency edge captured in a Pipeline Plan.

QualityCriterion.description: Declarative evaluation criterion for a quality gate.

QualityGate.description: Quality gate attached to a pipeline, step, or interface.

criteria.description: One or more declarative evaluation criteria.

placement.description: Placement of the gate within the pipeline.

id.description: Unique artifact identifier within the registry.

ResourceRequirements.description: Logical resource declarations independent of vendor infrastructure.

SchedulingConstraints.description: Timing and concurrency constraints for scheduling intent.

SchedulingEvent.description: Logical event that may initiate pipeline execution.

SchedulingIntent.description: Declared scheduling intent for a Pipeline Contract.

id.description: Optional stable identifier for this intent declaration.

SecretReference.description: Reference to an externally managed secret.

id.description: Stable identifier for this secret reference.

loc.description: External locator (URI, vault path, or provider reference).

SecurityMetadata.description:
Declarative security metadata attached to a Pipeline Contract.

Authentication, authorization, and secret-management systems remain outside DPCS scope. This model records portable references and integrity pointers.

auditPolicyRef.description: Optional audit policy identifier or reference.

integrityRefs.description: Integrity references (hashes, signatures, or attestation pointers).

secretRefs.description: External secret references (URIs or vault paths). Must not embed secret values.

oneOf.description: Informational observation that does not affect validity.
Non-fatal issue that should be reviewed.
Error that makes the contract invalid.

StepPort.description: Input or output port declared on a pipeline step.

contractRef.description: Optional contract reference for the port.

ValidationReport.description: Deterministic collection of diagnostics produced by validation.

info.description: Informative OpenAPI component schemas for DPCS 1.0.0-draft documents and reports.
info.title: DPCS Document Schemas

post.summary: Validate a Pipeline Contract (example tooling path)
